sources.title: Full Action Horror Movies | Van Helsing + Rise Of The Mummy | Double Feature Movies
sources.description:
Full Action Horror Movies | Van Helsing + Rise Of The Mummy | Double Feature Movies | Best New Movies | Back To Back Movies | New Action Movies 

Van Helsing: Van Helsing is called upon to help save a missing girl and her friends who are trapped in a radioactive tunnel from a hoard of mutants.
2022.  Stars: Michael Hoad, Darrell Griggs, Antonia Whillans

Rise of the Mummy: A group of archaeology students awaken an ancient mummy. After being trapped in a time loop, the only way they can escape, is to defeat the mummy. As the body count rises, it seems the Mummy has to collect the souls of those who woke him to be able to walk the earth - for good.
2021.  Stars: Abi Casson Thompson, Arthur Boan, Amanda-Jade Tyler

metadata.Plot: Van Helsing is in the world to rid all evil, even if not everyone agrees with him. The Vatican sends the monster hunter and his ally, Carl, to Transylvania. They have been sent to this land to stop the powerful Count Dracula. Whilst there they join forces with a Gypsy Princess called Anna Valerious, who is determined to end an ancient curse on her family by destroying the vampire. They just don't know how!
metadata.Actors: Hugh Jackman, Kate Beckinsale, Richard Roxburgh
